entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX delete row
entry.content:
Untested, but from memory it's something like:

data(sheet) = excel->get_active_worksheet( ).
data(row) = sheet->get_row( 1 ).
sheet->get_rows( )->remove( row ).

entry.title: Re: SAP FIORI My Inbox - QM
entry.content:
Hi,

are you still facing this issue?

I also had some trouble in the past with these workflows, for me the following solution worked:

- Please check Agent Assignment in customizing

- If you don't maintain org. assignment, you need to set "General Task" for Workflow Template and Standard Task. 

Best regards

Jonathan

entry.title: Re: SAP PMR ( Promotion for Retail) Help
entry.content:
Hi,

Free content from SAP is available only form SAP help pages here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/CARAB/dfa9dfcd457e4ba7acdfb03f30877d5f/b59f5b5392e21f37e10000000a423f68.html?locale=en-US

There is a paid option also, corresponding 3 days long workshop can be found with code W26PMR on training.sap.com

Best regards,
Andras

The values are getting captured in below order only and appended in select-options in the same order.

But i am getting the values (while displaying) in below order, also the 1st value is getting replaced by the last value, which should not happen.

Regards,

Farhan

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP ARIBA (SAP RISE Subs...
entry.content: Depending on the skill profile, another option could be to use the BTP application as laid out in this mission.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK: Attachment delete button not working in Web...
entry.content:
MDK web preview runtime was introduced two years ago. This would help customers testing the latest features before rolling them to production.

  • For any MDK major release (like 24.4.0), the preview web runtime will be updated first and, after two weeks, the production web runtime will be updated.
  • For any MDK patch release (like 24.4.1), both the preview and production web runtimes will be updated at the same time.

entry.title: Re: Transform your business by transforming your business processes
entry.content:
Hey @michael_sokollek  - I do not understand the promotion of the package:

RISE (public cloud) customers cannot use Process Insights with their S/4 HANA cloud solution - Help Portal . 

Can you comment?

 

Best regards, Hannes

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
entry.content:
Hi Andrea, 

The SuccessFactors Learning token server will reach End of Maintenance on November 17, 2023 and will be Deleted on November 20, 2026.

Deprecation Details Migration from the SuccessFactors Learning token server to the platform token server improves API support for customers. The SuccessFactors Learning OAuth token server uses HTTP basic authentication (Client ID and Secret) for token requests compared to the platform token server which supports the more secure SAML Assertion Based token request.

Note: You should discontinue using the SuccessFactors Learning token server and start using the more secure platform token server. In the future, SAP will support an OpenID Connect (OIDC) protocol-based solution using Identity Authentication. When that solution is available, we will provide further guidance.

If you have existing OCN that uses the the old Learning Tokens for access then yes it would be eventually impacted. The authentication would need to be updated with the OAuth 2.0 with your vendor.

For existing trainings already imported they may not be impacted. The training URLs will not change even for imported ones. It's the authentication that's changing and the URL will not have an impact. Also, the courses have vendor's URL and not LMS, so it won't be impacted.

entry.title: SAP Activate Methodology Accelerators - Error
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,

We are accessing the public documentation on the SAP Activate Methodology within the Roadmap and reviewing the Excel document titled "Project-Plan_EN_24Q1-Activity and Task-Level.xlsx" where we are having issues with 2 documents in particular.

1) ID S4H.0376 – Data Migration Issues and Risks Template: The source URL has an associated document other than the one in the "S4H_127" title that is not a data migration document is OCM.

2) ID S4H.0378 – Data Migration Quality Tracking: Same error as case 1, associated source is not correct.

Does anyone know the correct source for these two documents?.

Is there another public SAP Activate database that we can consult?.

Thank you all and best regards.

entry.title: Re: fuzzy search with multiple name fields
entry.content:
thanks - the "or" suggestion works fine.

the code now looks like this:

 

CLASS zz9xx_cl_ac_fuzzy_search_prem DEFINITION
   PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_pa0002,
             fuzzy_score TYPE zfuzzy_similarity,
             vorna       TYPE pa0002-vorna,
             rufnm       TYPE pa0002-rufnm,
             nachn       TYPE pa0002-nachn,
             name2       TYPE pa0002-name2,
             pernr       TYPE pa0002-pernr,
           END OF ty_pa0002.

    TYPES: tt_pa0002 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pa0002.

    CLASS-METHODS get_fuzzy_pa0002 IMPORTING VALUE(im_first_name)       TYPE string
                                             VALUE(im_last_name)        TYPE string
                                             VALUE(im_fuzzy_similarity) TYPE zfuzzy_similarity
                                   EXPORTING VALUE(t_pa0002)            TYPE tt_pa0002.

  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zz9xx_cl_ac_fuzzy_search_prem IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD get_fuzzy_pa0002 BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
                      USING pa0002.
    t_pa0002 = select  SCORE() as fuzzy_score, vorna, rufnm, nachn, name2, pernr
              from pa0002
              where ( (  contains (  ( vorna, rufnm) ,  :im_first_name , fuzzy( :im_fuzzy_similarity ) )
                      AND (  contains (  nachn ,  :im_last_name , fuzzy( :im_fuzzy_similarity ) )
                             or contains (  nachn ,  :im_last_name , fuzzy( :im_fuzzy_similarity ) ) )

                       ) and endda = '99991231'
                  ) ORDER BY fuzzy_score DESC
                  ;


  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Using AMDP in CDS and Some Useful Functions
entry.content:
Instead of passing a where condition, why not pass the individual ranges in some form and use them directly in the query? That would also avoid recompilation of the filter and query plan and might improve performance a little more.

Note that applying the filter the way you did already is the way of using a dynamic where clause in the query. APPLY_FILTER is not the same as making a query and then throwing away rows in hindsight. Think of it as "defining" the query and then adding a filter to its "definition". The query is not executed immediately (the debugger does that, but only so you can see what would be the result if you didn't apply the filter). So if your performance is low, it is likely due to missing indexes and not due to APPLY_FILTER.

For passing parameters to a HDB CDS view maybe section "Invoking CDS views with parameters" in CDS view syntax also works for HDB SQLScript.

entry.title: Re: OData Filtering in SAP Build Apps – Could This Work For You?
entry.content:
Sorry to have missed this reply.

SAP Build Apps sometimes does not know the schema of the response, so it will not provide you with autocomplete of the fields. The way around this is to use a formula, where you can specify anything you want. Note you might get a warning in red saying it doesn't recognize the field, but you can still use it.

SAP Build Apps can recognize the schema if you run a test in the data resource (Data tab) and then click SET SCHEMA FROM RESPONSE.

entry.title: SOP with Forecst Planning
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to check with you regarding forecast planning, we are using SOP with forecast planning.

We have changed the Forecast model to N as we don't anymore to plan this material, we have the following job which execute with different steps every month. In the step when RMCP6BIN is running the forecast values are keep updating in MC95. 

Not sure why this keep updating though we kept the model as N. Please let me know if you have any idea.

Thanks

Satish

entry.title: Usage Procedure Logging SAP Tables
entry.content:
I have Usage Procedure Logging activate in my system , but i am considering to stop the Job 
RSCVR_TRIGGER_COLLECT , i don't find the SAP Tables where that information is stored , i need to know those SAP Tables in order to start a deletion because i need space in the database!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Usage Procedure Logging SAP Tables
entry.content:
To de-activate UPL, please just delete the UPL job /sdf/upl_periodic_ext_job from managed system with steps below:

  1. Open SM37;
  2. Check for the job named “/sdf/upl_periodic_ext_job"
    1. Enter the user as a wildcard (*)
    2. Extend the time period forward by 2-3 days
  3. Execute;
  4. When the list is returned; Delete any “Scheduled” or “Released” instances of the job.

Please note that the UPL data is not stored on managed system but is sent to solution manager system for storage.
So on managed system side, there is no such UPL storage table to delete.

Best Regards,
David

entry.title: Re: How does valies assigned to fields Menge an BETRAG at start of FM ' mb_calculate_values' ?
entry.content: First read some documentation on QUAN fields, internal and exeternal formats.

entry.title: Configuration of protocols
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know which protocols are activated and how they are configured in my new HANA Cloud.

I found the configuration of some protocols (e.g. for SAL, erro logs and tables in IMG) but not for others. Does anyone know where to find the configuration (not the protocol itself) of the following protocols?

  • Change Documents

  • Change Logs 
  • System Logs
  • User Change Log
  • User-Change logs
  • Transaction logs
  • Change and Transport System (CTS) Logs

  • Application Log

Thank you

entry.title: Re: OCC extension and cache manager
entry.content:
Hello Vitalii,

I might be answering this too late (but hopefully this would help someone else later on). I just found out about the 2211 version of the Extending Server-Side Caching documentation that works for my OCC extension. 

The cache manager definition of yours is very likely outdated for the OCC extension as I believe it was meant for the old addOn approach instead. The 2211 version of the guide is working for me. 

Eric

entry.title: Material has status: Technical Defect (delivery is not allowed)
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I tested Advanced Returns Management in Return to Supplier (BMK) at SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Firstly, I created Purchase Order - Advanced with Order type: Enh.Ret.to Supplier.

And then created Outbound Delivery in Background with My Purchase Orders - Due for Delivery.

I am facing an error message Material has status: Technical Defect (delivery is not allowed).

What do I need to check and configure for this process?

SAP Supply Chain Management 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Sac Dimension Comment
entry.content:
Hi Rosanna,

Dimension comments are stored globally and should be available to any story that has the same dimension view.

Note that there are limitations under what conditions dimension comments can be viewed. For example, dimension comments are only supported on tables with the option of Optimized Presentation enabled.

Have you checked the online-help regarding dimension comments and verified that your new story is valid? If you add a new dimension comment in the new story can you view the new comment but not the old one?

You can find the online help regarding this feature here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/ee4c734f5c104f349009f176973273f7.html?locale=en-US

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Displaying a PDF File in SAP Analytics Cloud, Analytic App with Custom Widget
entry.content:
Hi Ferry,

Good Day!

After downloading the required PDF custom widget files from github(https://github.com/ferrygun/SACPDFViewer), we attempted to upload them after adjusting relevant changes in JSON. However, during the resource file upload process, we encountered the following error. I have attached the JSON and resource file that we are trying to upload into SAC. 

I kindly request your assistance in fix this issue so that we can utilize the PDF widget to meet our specific requirements.

JSON Code: We made modifications only to the JSON file, while the JS scripts remain unchanged (we are utilizing the same code from GitHub).
{
  "id": "com.fd.djaja.sap.sac.pdfviewer",
  "version": "0.0.2",
  "name": "PDFViewer",
  "description": "PDF Viewer",
  "newInstancePrefix": "PDFViewer",
  "icon": "",
  "vendor": "Ferry Djaja",
  "eula": "",
  "license": "",
  "webcomponents": [
    {
      "kind": "main",
      "tag": "com-fd-djaja-sap-sac-pdfviewer",
      "url": "/pdfviewer.js",
      "integrity": "",
      "ignoreIntegrity": true
    },
    {
      "kind": "styling",
      "tag": "com-fd-djaja-sap-sac-pdfviewer-aps",
      "url": "/aps_pdfviewer.js",
      "integrity": "",
      "ignoreIntegrity": true
    }
  ],
  "properties": {
    "metadata": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "For internal use",
      "default": ""
    },
    "PDFURL": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PDF URL",
      "default": ""
    },
    "title": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "title",
      "default": ""
    },
    "height": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "height",
      "default": ""
    }
  },
  "methods": {
    "getPDFURL": {
      "returnType": "string",
      "description": "Get the PDF URL",
      "parameters": [],
      "body": "return this.PDFURL;"
    },
    "setPDFURL": {
      "description": "Set PDF URL",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "name": "value",
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The new PDF URL"
        }
      ],
      "body": "this.PDFURL = value;"
    },
    "getTitle": {
      "returnType": "string",
      "description": "Get the title",
      "parameters": [],
      "body": "return this.title;"
    },
    "setTitle": {
      "description": "Set the title",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "name": "value",
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The new title"
        }
      ],
      "body": "this.title = value;"
    },
    "getHeight": {
      "returnType": "string",
      "description": "Get the height",
      "parameters": [],
      "body": "return this.height;"
    },
    "setHeight": {
      "description": "Set the height",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "name": "value",
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The new height"
        }
      ],
      "body": "this.height = value;"
    }
  },
  "events": {
    "onStart": {
      "description": "Specify the SAC Script that shall be triggered when the Export process is started."
    }
  }
}

Thanks,

Pradeep

entry.title: DMC SAP Build Workzone Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to find information on how to integrate SAP DMC with SAP Build Workzone (aka SAP Launchpad service). However, it doesn't seem to be supported - which is strange as SAP Build Workzone has it's own Launchpad.

Any information on how to integrate - content package / content provider?

Best regards,

Frank

entry.title: Re: Pricing Error: Mandatory pricing PR00 is missing
entry.content:
SOLUTION- TCODE-VK11 (CREATE CONDITION RECORD)

FOLLOW STEPS-

*)GO TO TCODE-VK11

*)SELECT- EPR0-ENERG UNIT PRICE

SELECT- KEY COMBINATION-MATERIAL/BATCH

*)SELECT-BATCH NO-SAL02, AMOUNT-101, VALID FROM-06.07.2023 TO 31.12.1999

save

https://www.learntosap.com/sderrorpage3.html

entry.title: Question regarding enabling the Extended Integration Impact Analysis for SAP Readiness Check
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are working to execute SAP Readiness Check and prepare to migrate to S/4HANA.

It shows that 3061414 - Enabling extended integration impact analysis for SAP Readiness Check can not be installed on our system. Is there a workaround to import this note?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Question regarding enabling the Extended Integration...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please note that in order to perform the extended integration analysis as part of the Readiness Check, the ST-A/PI component version must be updated to 01U* SP02 (and implement SAP Note 3072059), or 01U* SP03+.

Please review the "Reasons and Prerequisites" section of note 3061414. There is currently no workaround available for this.

Kind regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Unable to translate the classic view menu tab.
entry.content:

Tab (Goals) in Classic View of report centre cannot be translated. I downloaded the language packs but cannot find the tab name in both English and Spanish.

I used the English debug, and found that it is referred to as Objectives, yet I cannot find it in both language packs mentioned above.

When I search Objectives or Goals in text replacement, I still can't find the tab. 

I will appreciate your input.

entry.title: Configuring SAP CI/CD pipeline for Deploying ReactJS application in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
In this blog, we will discuss how to integrate SAP CI/CD pipeline for deploying ReactJS application on SAP Cloud Foundry environment.

You will learn,

  • How to create and build a ReactJS application.
  • How to configure and run SAP CI/CD Pipeline service.
  • How to create GitHub Webhook for automatically build, test and deploying the code changes.

 

Prerequisites

  • You have an SAP BTP Global or trial account.
  • Node installed in your system.
  • You have a GitHub account.

 

Setting up React Application

step 1: Create your react application using the create-react-app. The create-react-app is an excellent tool which allows you to create and run React project very quickly by wrapping all the required dependencies.

npx create-react-app reactcicd

step 2: To ensure that the application is running as expected, open the terminal and navigate to the application folder and type the below command. The application gets automatically hosted in the default server localhost:3000 and you’ll get the following screen.

npm start

 step 3:  Now create manifest.yml file for determining the Cloud Foundry app configurations and paste the below contents.

 ---
applications:
- name: your-app-name
path: build/
instances: 1
buildpack: https://github.com/cloudfoundry/staticfile-buildpack.git
memory: 256M

 step 4: Build the application using the below command, you will see the build folder getting added to your  project. 

npm run build

 Also create a Staticfile with the following content in the build folder as shown below

 

 

 

 

 

 

step 5: Now create a repository in your GitHub and push the changes. Make sure to remove build folder from the gitignore file since it is added default while creating the react project, we require it for deployment. For more details on how to deploy react application refer this link react-CF-deploy 

 

Enable SAP Continuous integration and Delivery Service

step 1: Login into SAP BTP Cockpit and choose the subaccount to which you want to deploy your application.

step 2: Select Service Marketplace from the side pane and search for Continuous Integration and Delivery service. Click the create button

step 3: Create popup will appear then choose the plan you want to and click create button at the bottom. Choose View Subscription and wait until the status changes to Subscribed.

step 4: Once the status is changed to subscribed navigate to Security → Role Collections from the left-hand pane. Choose role collection CICD Service Administrator and click edit.

step 5: Navigate to users section click edit then Add a new row in the Users section table, enter your user id, Keep the identity provider as default and click save.

 

Configure your credentials

step 1: Go to Services → Instances and Subscriptions from the pane. Choose the application icon located next to the Continuous Integration & Delivery subscription. Now we need to add credentials for GitHub, CF and Webhook.

step 2: Let’s first go with GitHub credentials. If your GitHub repository is private, you will need to provide with the necessary credentials to access it. You can skip this in case of public repository.

step 3: In Create Credentials popup make sure you give unique name within the subaccount. Select the type as basic authentication and provide your git credentials. Use personal access token as a password. Then choose create.

step 4: Now repeat the same steps for adding CF credentials. Here you have to provide your SAP BTP cockpit username and password.

step 5: For configuring webhook credentials change the type from Basic Authentication to Webhook Secret. Then generate the webhook secret copy it somewhere safe and finally choose Create.

 

 Add a CI/CD job

step 1: Navigate to the Jobs tab and choose the icon to add a new job. Provide unique name for the job.

step 2: Click on the icon inside the Repository input field. You will get a popup then choose add repository., Enter your git repository clone URL. You can add any name of your choice. It need not to be matched with your repo. Choose your saved credentials for git and webhook.

step 3: For Branch, enter the GitHub branch of your repository from which you want to receive push events. In this example, master. Select Cloud Foundry Environment from the dropdown in the Pipeline field.

step 4: In the BUILD section choose npm as your build tool. For Build Tool Version, select the latest node version.

step 5: Under the Release section, switch on the execution of the Deploy to Cloud Foundry Space. Since we have already given name in the manifest file, we can skip the name field. 

Replace the placeholders API Endpoint, Org Name and Space with the values in the Cloud Foundry environment to which you want to deploy. You can get the values from your subaccount overview in the SAP BTP cockpit.

step 6: For Deploy Type, choose standard and select your previously created CF credentials. Leave remaining fields default then finally choose create.

 

Create a GitHub Webhook

GitHub webhooks allow you to automate CI/CD builds. Whenever you push changes to your GitHub repository, a webhook push event is sent to the service to trigger a build of the connected job.

step 1: To create a webhook in GitHub, you need payload URL. Select your repository and choose Webhook Data from the right pane. You will see a below popup:

step 2: Now sign in into your GitHub account. In your project, go to the Settings tab.

step 3: From the left pane, choose Webhooks then Add webhook. Enter the Payload URL, Content type from the popup and  the Secret that you had saved previously. For all other settings, leave the default values and add.

 

Verify your Build

You have to trigger your job manually the first time after creation.

step 1: In Jobs tab, select your job and choose Run. Verify that a new tile appears in the Builds view. This tile should be marked as running.

step 2: Wait until the job has finished and verify that the build tile is marked as successful.

step 3: Navigate to your space in the SAP BTP cockpit and check the list of installed applications. Now you can see your application got added. 

step 4: Select your application and launch it with the application route. You can see the react application deployed. 

 

You have now successfully created a CI/CD pipeline and deployed your Reactjs application to SAP BTP. From now on for every commit you can see the job getting triggered with commit id displayed under builds section.

entry.title: Re: How does valies assigned to fields Menge an BETRAG at start of FM ' mb_calculate_values' ?

entry.title: JSON Web Encryption in SAP CPI using public Key
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement where the incoming payload has to be encrypted using various components of RFC 7516 - JSON Web Encryption (JWE) (ietf.org) JSON Web encryption like cipher text , IV , Additional Auth Tag.

How do u suggest this can be acheived? Can you suggest a script to accomplish this? external jars?

entry.title: Is First Time Manager ()
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to build an OnChange rule that would update a custom string to help us flag new managers and design some training around that.

I've made it as so, which then would be added as a change rule to the custom field i have in jobinfo under "New Manager" - but of course i just get blank values. 

Any idea if I have made a mistake somewhere?

 

Kind regards,

Antonis

entry.title: Re: Transform your business by transforming your business processes
entry.content:
Hi CFGHS,

thanks for your comment. The blog refers to RISE with SAP, our private edition. Grow, our public edition, in deed does not support Process Insights as per your documentation. As always, please check your specific entitlement for your individual contract.

Best regards, Michael

entry.title: Re: FIORI Launchpad timeout settings

Hello
Can you share the sample code of the call FM?

how did you map which fields?

thanks

entry.title: Change text display order in MM02
entry.content:
Hi everyone 

Can i change the text display order in  MM02 ???

entry.title: Re: Update last calculated price
entry.content: You can Update the Last Purchase Price and Last Evaluated Price by Running the Audit Report under Inventory Reports in the modules.

entry.title: Crystal Report for Visual Studio 2022 on Windows 11 ARM
entry.content:
Hello , I'm trying to create my development environment on a Windows 11 ARM virtual machine on a Macbook Pro M3 (Silicon ARM) : can anyone tell me if Crystal Report for Visual Studio working on ARM Visual Studio + ARM operating system ?

I installed the latest available version SP35 to 64 (CRforVS6413SP35_0-80007712.EXE) with Visual Studio 2022, but the CR components are not loaded.

Thank You

entry.title: What role does SAP play in optimizing asset management and maintenance processes in the oil, gas, an
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone elaborate on the key features and functionalities of SAP's EAM solutions that enable companies in this sector throughout their lifecycle?

Thank for your support

entry.title: Switch off 'SSL certificate verification' setting in BPA
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have one automation which is getting data from SuccessFactors system. This works well from one network, but from other network, we get the issue

"unable to get local issuer certificate"

Same issue happens with Postman also, but there we have option to switch off SSL Verfication.

From chrome or edge if we access the same query, we get the data(maybe internally it switched off SSL Verfication)

Could you please help me what to do so that i dont get this error in  running automation. Or how can i switch this verification off, like we can do in Postman

entry.content:
@mnr_sap1 

No tool available and its not advisable to edit the transport package also.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Assign manual batch/serial numbers for when the batch...

entry.title: Filter By Child Association Column values in LROP - BTP ABAP Envrionment
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any alternative way in the BTP ABAP Environment to fitler data using Associated column values ?

I was trying to use virtual element with below annotation which gives an error as "@ObjectModel.filter.transformedBy is not permitted or released"

@ObjectModel.filter.transformedBy

I am able to use filter only for root node (list page) columns.

@Andre_Fischer - Please help me here,

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: Re: Need to do validations for csv file (Incoming)
entry.content: Hi David, could you please tell how it can be done with message mapping

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Objects restful api Logoff
entry.content:
Hi,

I think your biprws url for logoff is wrong.

Try with this one:
hostUrl = 'http://server_name:6405/biprws/v1'

entry.title: Crystal jars upgrade with Wildfly and JDK
entry.content:
We want to upgrade the crystal jars to latest version along with Wildfly and JDK.

Currently tried with below versions, but very low performance was observed. Not sure what component is causing the issue. 

  • Crystal server OS - Win 2019
  • Crystal jars - SP30 - 12.2.231.5147
  • Oracle JDK - 11/8
  • Wildfly - 19

I there any way to increase the performance? Or please share the compatibility of these components with each other, so we can try upgrading most of the components and keep the one as is which is reducing the performance. 

 

Thanks in advance!

- Shravani

entry.title: Re: How to show value help with values for Application Jo...
entry.content:
Hello @Andre_Fischer,

I would like to show some data when I click and open value help dialog but unable to do that now.

I have checked the template for "Lock Unused Business users" in the ADT which tells it was created using report based catalog entries but in the BTP ABAP environment we cannot do this GUI.

What is an alternative way for this ? How do we populate our custom value help dialog in these job parameters.

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: SAP DM - Qualification Management and Certification Management
entry.content:
Hello,

I try to setup the qualification and certification management in SAP DM. It is a scenario without Sucessfactor Integration.

I am orientating on the Best run bike scenario on SAP Demo Content Discovery and I try to replicate it on my System.

On my system I have the problem, that a certification assigned to a User does not trigger the expected filter in schedule labor app. I can filter the people by certifactes but when I try to assigne the people to a work center it says no workcenter is available for the filter criteria. (See attachement  "schedule labor). The certificates are assigned to the relevant ressources in the Manage Certifications App. 

 

I checked the Best run bike scenario to find out what is wrong. The only difference I can see ist, that in the skill matrix some certifications are define as "Qualification" and some as "Certification". (See attachement "skill matrix"). But I cannot find how to differenciate between both or how I can generate a qualification instead of a certification. Not sure if this is the relevant difference.

Of course all names are only Demo data. No sensible data in the screenshots.

All kind of support is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Custom data as table, CDS, Domain, Business object and all that jazz...
entry.content:
Hello @Mehh 

I'm glad it was helpful.

As to your questions:

  1. I'm not sure what you did, but the CDS generated by Custom Business Object is just like any other CDS, except that it cannot be changed by ADT. But you can reuse it in your own CDS development, using ADT which is connected to your S/4HANA system. Because you said "development tenant", I am assuming that your refer to the ABAP Environment on your SAP BTP? You must note that your ABAP Environment on BTP is not your S/4HANA system, it's a side-by-side extra environment where you can code side-by-side. What I'm referring to is 3SL Public Cloud landscape ABAP Cloud project, that you have connected to your ADT, meaning it is directly connected to your S/4HANA. If you want to access your Custom Business Object on your SAP BTP, you need to specifically expose it. Here is a tutorial for that Expose Custom Business Object as External Web Service | SAP Tutorials.
    And to prove that it's possible to use the generated CDS in your own development: coming back to my example where I created the Author as a Custom Business Object. Say I want to create a simple API that exposes all products that are books and have an author. Since it does not yet exist, I would create my own CDS and subsequent objects for that API, and I would use the ZZ1_AUTHOR CDS (which was generated by Custom Business Objects). Please see the screenshot below:
  2. Yes, parent-child is the max on hierarchy levels. You can add several nodes as children, say in my case I could have the Family Members node for the Author and also Favorite Meals node. Both would then be the child of the Author main object. I'm not aware of any plan to add further nodes in Custom Business Object, but it is possible if you develop your own RAP composite object with several children within children. C_SALESORDERMANAGE (and linked CDS) is a great CDS to study which has Sales Order head as main object, sales order item (among others) as child and also the schedule lines per item, as child for the item, so 3 levels of hierarchy.

entry.title: Re: Data Load Integrity Control
entry.content: The form has a validation for "Batch Size" that shows a message "Enter a number between 0 and 100000." if criteria is not meet.

entry.title: using Already availble XSUAA service to another application giving service broker failed error
entry.content:
I have a MTA app(lets say uaatest Having standalone app router) which is already deployed to cloud foundry and having XSUAA service(with its xs-security.json contents).
I have developed another  MTA app (lets say uaatest2 Having standalone app router),  In this i tried using above mentioned XSUAA(which is already used for uaatest). But with xs-security.json file that is specifically referring to my uaatest2.

while deploying to CF i am getting an error saying that "Service broker error: Service broker xsuaa failed with: Could not find xsapp entry for uaatest2!t259732"  

this (uaatest2!t259732) is referring to my uaatest2.

Even though i am using same xsuaa service but still i can maintain two different "xsappname" entries in my each xs-security.json file(referring to uaatest and uaatest2) right?

or am i missing something? or please give me an example how to use already available xsuaa to new MTA with its own xs-security.json.

 

please find attached xs-security.json  for reference.

 

Thanks in advance

Rakesh.

entry.title: SAP Master Tables
entry.content:
Hi All,

Here I've mentioned some SAP Master Tables.

Master Tables in SAP

Storage locations                                                                               - T001L
Plant                                                                                                  - T001W
Material Type Descriptions                                                               - T134T
Material pricing group 1: Description                                               - TVM1T
Material pricing group 2: Description                                               - TVM2T
Material pricing group 3: Description                                               - TVM3T
Material pricing group 4: Description                                               - TVM4T
Material pricing group 5: Description                                               - TVM5T
Taxes: Region Key: Texts                                                                  - T005U
VendorAccountGroupNames(Table T077K)                                     - T077Y
Country Names                                                                                  - T005T
Account Group Names (Table T077D)                                              - T077X
Customers: Customer groups: Texts                                                   - T151T
Routes: Texts                                                                                      - TVROT
Special G/L Indicator Names                                                             - T074T
Sales Organizations                                                                            - TVKO
Sales Divisions: Texts                                                                        - TSPAT
Distribution Channels: Texts                                                              - TVTWT
G/L Account Master (Chart of Accounts)                                           - SKA1
Vendor Master (General Section)                                                       - LFA1
General Data in Customer Master                                                      - KNA1
Account Group Names (Table T077K)                                               - T077Y
Bank master record                                                                             - BNKA
General Material Data                                                                        - MARA
Valuation area                                                                                     - T001K
Language Key Texts                                                                           - T002T

Asset Master Record Segment                                                           - ANLA
Equipment master data                                                                       - EQUI
Business Place                                                                                    - J_1BBRANCH

 

Thanks,

Naveen

entry.title: Re: CDS Projection View parameters not allowed
entry.content:
@AbhishekSharma 

The error indicates that parameters are not permitted in CDS views intended for transactional processing. If this is a read-only scenario, consider removing the 'root' keyword from the view definition.

entry.title: how to check business catalog to be assigned For custom in app application in sap s4hana cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We have developed a custom in-app application based on custom CDS views and analytical querying using standard views (I_MfgOrderDocdGoodsMovement and I_FixedAsset). We need to assign it to a particular user. How can we determine the suitable Business Catalog to assign to the custom application for the specific user to access it?

Could you please explain and assist us with our query?

Thanks and Regards, Ruchi Kesharwani

entry.title: Re: using Already availble XSUAA service to another appli...
entry.content:
@rakeshBaggam 

Each XSUAA instance can support only one 'xsappname' and one 'xs-security.json' configuration. To reuse an existing service instance, specify the instance name in the 'mta.yaml' file for the second application as shown below:

resources:
- name: uaatest-xsuaa-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service

entry.title: Re: In ECC SD on the sales Document on the conditions tab...
entry.content: Yes technically speaking, this net value (VBAP-NETWR) will always be positive.  If you have any discount condition type in your pricing procedure that flows to your sale order / billing, you can check those condition types in KONV table

entry.title: Strategy profile assignment

i could see strategy profile in multiple places , there should always be Global level and local level - in which screen strategy profile is assigned at Global level and in which screen at local level ?

When a run is conducted which takes precedence ?

I would be happy to get answers for this

Regards,
René

For your information, kindly refer below blog/question i have posted.

entry.title: Re: Can we change material availability date in Sales ord...
entry.content: Yes we use ATP .. but my basic understanding is why dont we Over write these dates .. Please refer to F1 Description of field Material availability date .. SAP saying that we can change the date manually ( This is misleading )

entry.title: Adjust settlement rule automatically created in IM for AuC
entry.content:
Hi all,

I currently have a question in regards to WBS settlement to AuC in combination with SAP Universal Parallel Accounting. The current setup works as follows:

  1. WBS created
  2. Automatic creation of AuC when WBS is REL
  3. With first settlement to AuC the system automatically creates the settlement rule for WBS -> AuC for all Ledgers (with 1 row in the settlement rule and Ledger field empty
  4. Final to be put in the settlement rule and when WBS is set to TECO the value gets settled from AuC -> Final asset.

This setup is generally fine, but we have in some cases the special requirement that we only want to settle the costs on the WBS to AuC for some Ledgers (e.g. only for Local GAAP Ledger but not the Global IFRS Ledger) and for the other Ledgers the cost should be directly expensed (settled to a cost center).

The problem is that the automatically created settlement rule for the AuC always settles to all ledgers (ledgers field kept empty). Can I somehow chance this behaviour in the customization and get ledger specific settlement rules?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Qualification Management and Certification M...
entry.content:
Hi @DaMa,

Certifications and Qualifications are defined by 'Duration Type', where Certifications are 'Temporary' and Qualifications 'Permanent'.

In order to show up in 'Assign Work Center' menu at Schedule Labor app, the Work Center must be assigned to (your) supervisor user in Manage User Assignments app.

Hope it helps,
Manoel

entry.title: Can I centrally manage the printers through SAP Customer Checkout Manager?
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have a scenario where there are multiple CCO machines and currently, I have mapped all the printers for individual printers based on the article group. Is there any facility to do the same thing from the SAP customer checkout manager? Please help me with this.

entry.title: Re: Struggling with Filters on Select - Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi,

For dynamically, the select has change event. Please try below code sample in the event.

var oSelect1 = oEvent.getSource();
var sSelectedKey = oSelect1.getSelectedKey();

var Filter = [new Filter("YOUR_FIELD", FilterOperator.EQ, sSelectedKey )];

var oSelect2 = this.byId("YOUR_SECOND_DROPBOX_ID"),
oTemplate = oTable.getBindingInfo("items").template;
oSelect2 .unbindAggregation("items");

oSelect2 .bindItems({
path: "/YOUR_ENTITYSET",
template: oTemplate,
filters: aFilter,
events: {
dataRequested: function() {},
dataReceived: function() {}
}});

entry.title: Encountering a script error on the Crystal Report
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm encountering a script error on the Crystal Report preview in SAP B1 Client. The SAP B1 version is 10.0 FP 2202. This error occurs when you preview the report and input parameters. Please see the image below:

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA  SAP Business One SAP Crystal Reports 

 

Regards,
Maaz

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Rule Based COI - TP calculation
entry.content:
1. For Rule 041, check box "Percentage Complementary" is ticked. If ownership is 100%, then Rule 041, the factor is 0%.

2. By default if percentage is not specified in Further Settings of Settings tab, it will get the value from the selection on Percentage tab. If the selection is empty of the value of the selection not found, it will use default 100%.

3. Now comes to the question with regards to the 80%. You should be able to verify whether your ownership is maintained / calculated correctly per https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/79940df720e24c29b1569dda5d741bc7.html

entry.title: Re: Can we change material availability date in Sales ord...
entry.content: You can change the date if you do not check ATP and do all the confirmations manually. But I would like to understand the motivation behind the manual change. It seems there is an unexpected result from the calculation. Can you elaborate a little more on the concrete example and the expectations you have when it comes to confirmation?

entry.title: S/4 Flexible PO Workflow -Approval Limit Check
entry.content:
I'm currently configuring the Flexible PO Workflow and have encountered a requirement related to agent approval limits during purchase order approval. The specific need is to check the agent's approval limit before approving the purchase order. We dont want this during agent determination. The ask is to send all the tasks to one agents who will then manually forward them to the actual Approvers.

I'm seeking guidance on which Business Add-In (BAdi) can be used to implement this check during the workflow task approval stage. Can anyone suggest a suitable BAdi that triggers during the approval process and allows for custom validation logic?

Matthias

entry.title: Fiori画面の仕様 1809と2023で出力幅が異なる
entry.content:
担当者様

お世話になっております。

現在1809から2023へバージョンアップを計画しており、
Fioriで1809で使用しているアプリを2023で実行テストしましたところ、画面幅が狭くなるという事象がありました。（GUIでは問題なく表示されます。）
1809と2023でFioriの画面出力する際に留意する点がありましたら情報を頂きたいと思います。

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Qualification Management and Certification M...
entry.content: Hi @ManoelCosta . Thanks for clerification regarding Certification vs. Qualification! Seems this was not the relevant point for my issue. But I am not there yet. The work center is assigned to my Supervisor user and the certifcates are assigned to the relevant ressources. (See attachement "Assignements"). But nonetheless I cannot assigne people to work centers. I can assigne them wehn I don't filter the people by certifciates. Only when I filter the people it sais no data for this filter criteria. (See attachement "assigne work center")

entry.title: Re: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
Hi anthonysc, 

   I believe the screenshot you show is for you to set the toolbar in different mode, it's not setting the story to be opened in embed mode by default. To open story in embed mode, you either can put embed keyword into URL or open the story in embed mode via script. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Tax rate maintenance is not supported in Ctry/Reg. &1, display mode only
entry.content:
Tax Code Creation not possible in app Define Tax code for Sales/Purchases ID 101016 

I am unable to create new tax code as the screen is only on display mode.  Tax rate maintenance is not supported in Ctry/Reg. &1, display mode only 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Tax rate maintenance is not supported in Ctry/Reg. &1...
entry.content:
Tax Rate maintenance is only possible if the TDT (Time-Dependent Tax) solution is activated in your system.

See Time-Dependent Taxes (TDT) is available for countries Countries/Regions Where Time-Dependent Taxes Is Enabled 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/a35c786335f3486686a36149545ee97e.html?state=LATEST&locale=en-US

 If the Country is not available for Time Dependent Tax, you should create a new case/Service Request according to the Roadmap Configure Tax Solution.

 

Follow link below which provides all steps for activation and creation on tax codes for countries for where time-dependent taxes is enabled. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/8fd78f3974b84e478dc99ae1ae1afc16.html

see referenced in link Defining Tax Codes for Time-Dependent Taxes https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/f2f57100c15a447faa7d3a781b4b514b.html?locale=en-US

"When time-dependent tax calculation (TDT) is active, you can maintain tax codes, rates, and tax code properties.

Once time-dependent tax calculation (TDT) is active for a target country/region, you can use the Define Tax Codes for Sales and Purchases configuration activity to maintain tax rates and tax codes."

see documentation in full. 

See also  kbas
2936931 - TDT S/4HANA Cloud
3171265 TDT activation status for Country/Region &1 is different in production in 3-System Landscape

See also help.sap.com documentation on System Landscape and Transport Management

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/6a1d1cd2e9a848dfb9c45a4669c577a0.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Sac Dimension Comment
entry.content:
Hi rosanna_chiarazzo,

    As long as the dimension comment formula and context are same between tables, you should see the same comments. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: How to configure SAP system in Eclipse ?
entry.content: Hello Matthias, Please let me know what exactly I have to do; I am quite confused.

entry.title: Which is the correct Learning Journey and Certification for Project Managers for SAP S/4HANA, Public
entry.content:
In the below link, if you navigate to Knowledge Requirements > SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Role: Project Manager, the Learning Journey and Certification both point to the Implementation Consultant. Is this an error? If yes, can it be fixed so that we know which certification to do for this role?

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html?#section-1-accordion-panel-section-row-item_2-widewidgets-accordionitem_copy_1_1292473518

Furthermore, the "Project Management" link in this page, is broken and does not take you anywhere:

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/products/s4hanacld/public-edition/about/training-and-education.html 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX delete row
entry.content: Please consider submitting any changes upstream: if you modify the library on your system, you'll miss out on portability and you'll be on your own for updates.

entry.title: Re: Can we change material availability date in Sales ord...
entry.content: And I marked Availability check as KP ... in This case also i am unable to change the material availability date ... So is ther any way ( SAP note , Standard way) to change the material availability date in standard way?
